vocab.setup: Single .db file. better-sqlite3 (Node, sync API). WAL mode (PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL) for concurrent reads.
vocab.orm: Drizzle ORM: drizzle(db, { schema }). Type-safe schema with sqliteTable + text/integer/real columns.
vocab.migrations: drizzle-kit generate then drizzle-kit migrate. Or drizzle-kit push for development.
vocab.query: Standard SQL with tagged template literals via Drizzle. Prepared statements for repeated queries.
vocab.production: Turso (libSQL) for distributed edge SQLite. Same Drizzle schema, swap driver to @libsql/client.
